title: McQueen Heights: NE
technique: Night-road bands, gray building slabs, cyan window grids, roofs, trees, and lawns use separate tile/shade vocabularies.

quality: Excellent architectural readability: windows, roofs, vegetation, and roads each retain a distinct material language.
summary: Gameplay town scene: night road, cyan-windowed gray buildings, roofs, lawns, and readable tree clusters.
